## What changed

Describe the behavior and why it belongs in Context Ray.

## Evidence and trust boundary

- What repository evidence is observed?
- What is inferred?
- What remains unobservable?
- Does any command, network, credential, or path boundary change?

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm verify`
- [ ] Adapter changes include fixtures and precedence/path tests
- [ ] Schema compatibility was considered
- [ ] Dashboard changes include browser and design QA where applicable
- [ ] `packages/action/dist` was rebuilt when Action/runtime code changed
